title: iris acutiloba subsp. demawendica
intro: Iris acutiloba subsp. demawendica is a plant species that belongs to the iris family and is native to the mountainous regions of Iran. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating digestive issues and promoting relaxation. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Iris acutiloba subsp. demawendica can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
